'''rathate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:lonesomely|lonesomely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lonesomely|lonesomely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rathate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:rathate|rathate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rathatesher|rathatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathatesherĂ«m|rathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rathatero|rathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rathateshĂ«|rathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathateshĂ«m|rathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirathatero|gokirathatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirathateshĂ«|gokirathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathateshĂ«m|gokirathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorathankerom|gorathankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorathankeshĂ«|gorathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathankeshĂ«m|gorathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorathankeya|gorathankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rathaterom|rathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathatemu|rathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rathateya|rathateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirathaterom|gokirathaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathatemu|gokirathatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirathateya|gokirathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:rathathate|rathathate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rathathatesher|rathathatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathathatesherĂ«m|rathathatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rathathatero|rathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rathathateshĂ«|rathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathathateshĂ«m|rathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirathathatero|gokirathathatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirathathateshĂ«|gokirathathateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathathateshĂ«m|gokirathathateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorathathankerom|gorathathankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorathathankeshĂ«|gorathathankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorathathankeshĂ«m|gorathathankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorathathankeya|gorathathankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rathathaterom|rathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rathathatemu|rathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rathathateya|rathathateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirathathaterom|gokirathathaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirathathatemu|gokirathathatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirathathateya|gokirathathateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠte|rĂŠthĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠtesher|rĂŠthĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠthĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠtero|rĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠthĂŠtero|gokirĂŠthĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠthĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠthĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠthĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠthĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠthĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠthĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠterom|rĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠtemu|rĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠthĂŠteya|rĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠthĂŠterom|gokirĂŠthĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠthĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠthĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠthĂŠteya|gokirĂŠthĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafthafte|rafthafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafthaftesher|rafthaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafthaftesherĂ«m|rafthaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafthaftero|rafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafthafteshĂ«|rafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafthafteshĂ«m|rafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafthaftero|gokirafthaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafthafteshĂ«|gokirafthafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafthafteshĂ«m|gokirafthafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafthafnkerom|gorafthafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafthafnkeshĂ«|gorafthafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafthafnkeshĂ«m|gorafthafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafthafnkeya|gorafthafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafthafterom|rafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafthaftemu|rafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafthafteya|rafthafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafthafterom|gokirafthafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafthaftemu|gokirafthaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafthafteya|gokirafthafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
